mapper.insert: INSERT INTO trip_helpful_votes (trip_id, user_id, is_helpful, created_at) VALUES (#{tripId}, #{userId}, #{isHelpful}, #{createdAt})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM trip_helpful_votes WHERE trip_id = #{tripId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT trip_id as tripId, user_id as userId, is_helpful as isHelpful, created_at as createdAt FROM trip_helpful_votes WHERE trip_id = #{tripId} AND user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM trip_helpful_votes WHERE trip_id = #{tripId} AND is_helpful = #{isHelpful}
